[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 1100110 4
2 0111100 4
3 1011011 5
4 0010101 3
5 0010010 2
6 1001011 4
7 0011111 5

01 10 0100100 2
12 21 0011000 2
23 32 0010001 2
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0000010 1
56 65 0001011 3
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0100000 1

02 20 1000010 2
13 31 0010100 2
24 42 0010010 2 match 5
35 53 0000001 1
46 64 0010010 2 match 5
57 75 0000000 a match 0
60 06 0000110 2
71 17 0110000 2

03 30 0000100 1
14 41 0010000 1
25 52 1001011 4 match 6
36 63 0010101 3 match 4
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 1000010 2
61 16 0011100 3
72 27 0010000 1

04 40 0000010 1
15 51 0001000 1
26 62 0011011 4
37 73 0010000 1
